pages.full_text:
Sunday

We visited Venetia & David in their new home "The New House" for coffee on our way home. Very smart bath rooms. Lovely home.
Soon after leaving the van mil o metre passed from 99,000 to 100,000. (Just under 4,000 per year.) On our way home to watch Boring Murray in Wimbledon Finals.
~~Friday~~ Monday August 12th

Thomas & family in France. Peter & family we've just spent a day with in new house in Tufnell Green. John has started at Bristol one week into ICU job. Charles living with future mo-in-law in Witney until Oxford ho- ready.
12.30 Simon & Eve, Tindse leave for farm. Jam on motorway, lunch, arrive farm at 3. Simon & Eve help bind hop stems around sticks & pull up weeds. Discuss small hop-drying frame with Andy - Eve suggest Queen ocluders. Watch bulldozers changing bank from J to V.
pages.notes: The diary records watching 'Boring Murray in Wimbledon Finals' — Andy Murray won Wimbledon in 2013; 'Monday August 12th' matches 12 Aug 2013, strongly anchoring the year. 'Friday' is struck through and replaced with 'Monday'. 'Tindse' may be a name or abbreviation — unclear. 'Mil o metre' is the diarist's spelling of milometer/odometer. 'Queen ocluders' possibly 'Queen excluders' (beekeeping frames). 'J to V' likely refers to the shape of a bank being re-shaped.

pages.full_text:
Joseph has won 5 rosettes at a gymkhana yesterday. A big break-time in his confidence. We play draughts. Or gorgeous weather Simon & I join adults at wood-work place for pyjya & chat. 2 firemen - Mr & Mrs.
Tuesday Aug 13th
We come to countryside for p.g. At 7.15 lorries arrive. By 7.45 there is one bull dozer or 2 ? 2 dumper trucks, 3 lorries delivering gravel outside (above Will + Kenny's caravan) & 3 grandchildren having break fast in our van. Simon helps William on farm. Freya takes children & me to Barnyard, shopping & Library. Back at farm physio arrives for Joseph in pool. Eve swims. lunch. Then we leave.
3.45. we reach Polwigo Campsite Llanwrthwl near Rhayader & Elan valley. We go on a lovely walk, small village.
Then read; sparkling wine, supper. Gorgeous sunshine. Cambrian Mtns.
pages.notes: Year 2013 confirmed by left page (Murray Wimbledon Finals + Monday Aug 12 match). 'Polwigo Campsite' could also read 'Polwigo' or '[?Polwigo]' — Wales near Rhayader; may be 'Polgwyo' or similar. 'Llanwrthwl' is a small village near Rhayader, Powys, Wales. 'p.g.' unclear abbreviation — possibly 'p.g.' as in paying guests or farm stay. 'pyjya' likely 'puja' or 'pizza' — unclear. 'Will + Kenny's caravan' are names, not places. 'firemen - Mr & Mrs' context unclear.
